data.title: Churchill Capital Corp IX Announces Filing of Post-Effective Amendment and Date of Extraordinary General Meeting
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, Churchill Capital Corp IX (NASDAQ: CCIX), a special purpose acquisition company, disclosed that it has submitted a post-effective amendment to its Form S-4 Registration Statement. The company has also postponed the extraordinary general meeting of shareholders set to decide on the merger with Plus Automation, Inc. (PlusAI), a prominent AI software provider for self-driving trucks. The meeting, originally planned for April 15th, has been rescheduled.

data.title: Hanon Systems Supplies Highly Integrated Cooling Entity for Electric Vehicles
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in Seoul, South Korea, Hanon Systems (KS:018880), a prominent automotive thermal management supplier part of the Hankook & Company Group, revealed they are providing an advanced integrated cooling system for electric vehicles.

data.title: BQool: Bringing Enterprise-Level Amazon AI Advertising Solutions to Growing Brands
data.description: In Taipei, Taiwan, BQool has launched its AI-driven advertising solution to assist Amazon sellers in enhancing performance with ease. The tool aims to simplify campaign management, streamlining tasks such as keyword research, bid adjustments, and budget optimization. By leveraging AI technology, users can effectively monitor performance metrics and maintain a healthy Advertising Cost of Sales (ACOS) to drive sales. This solution comes as a relief to sellers who find advertising to be increasingly complex and demanding, offering a comprehensive approach to improving outcomes.

data.title: Service Properties Trust Announces Pricing of $500 Million Underwritten Public Offering of Common Shares
data.description: Service Properties Trust disclosed today the pricing of its underwritten public offering of 416.7 million common shares at $1.20 per share, generating an anticipated total of $500 million in gross proceeds for SVC. After underwriting discounts, commissions, and other expenses, the net amount is set to be lower. The offering settlement is scheduled for approximately April 2, 2026.

data.title: Southwest Gas Kicks Off National Safe Digging Month With Call to Contact 811 Before Breaking Ground
data.description: In Las Vegas, as of March 31, 2026, Spring digging season is underway and proving to be a hectic period. With April designated as National Safe Digging Month, Southwest Gas is urging all individuals to reach out to 811 before beginning any excavation work this season. A recent national survey highlights the significant importance of this safety measure, emphasizing the potential risks involved.

data.title: Healthy Smiles Never Gets Old 2.0: New Report Highlights Oral Health Needs and Opportunities for California’s Growing Older Adult Population
data.description: A report on the oral health needs of older adults in California has been released by the Center for Oral Health, a nonprofit organization with 40 years of experience. The report focuses on identifying gaps and presenting solutions to improve oral health for older individuals in the state.

data.title: Economic Value of Family Caregiving in Mississippi Reaches $9.4 billion Annually, New AARP Report Shows
data.description: A recent report discovered that in Mississippi, approximately 690,000 family caregivers for adults dedicate a total of 620 million hours of care each year. The value of this work would amount to $9.4 billion annually if these caregivers were paid at market rates. This information was revealed in a report released on March 31, 2026, in Jackson.

data.title: Cavvy Energy reports exercise of warrants for over $500,000 in additional funding.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global market for electric vehicles (EVs) is expected to experience significant growth, with projections estimating a CAGR of 22.6% over the next five years. The market size in 2020 was $135.6 billion, and it is anticipated to reach $612.9 billion by 2026. The increasing demand for clean energy solutions, government initiatives promoting EV adoption, and advancements in battery technology are some of the key factors driving this growth. Additionally, the passenger vehicle segment is expected to hold the largest market share during this period. This trend underscores the growing shift towards sustainable transportation options worldwide.
